---
id: get-fact
title: "Get a single fact"
description: "Retrieve a single fact by its UUID. Returns 404 if the fact does not exist. See spec §5.5."
sidebar_label: "Get a single fact"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a single fact"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/facts/{fact_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a single fact by its UUID. Returns 404 if the fact does not exist. See spec §5.5.

  as={"h2"}
